title: dactylis glomerata subsp. maritima
intro: Dactylis glomerata subsp. maritima, also known as sea cockspur or maritime cockspur, is a subspecies of the Dactylis glomerata plant, a type of grass native to coastal areas in Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dactylis glomerata subsp. maritima include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The herbal preparation of this plant is typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
